name: Sombr
why_buzzing: Breakout hit 'back to friends' went mega-viral, wrote/produced in bedroom. Grammy Best New Artist nominee 2026. Performed at Spotify Best New Artist party.
venue_sizes: Festival circuit (Coachella, BottleRock Napa). Headlining mid-size venues 2000-4000 cap expected later 2026.

name: Djo (Joe Keery)
why_buzzing: Hit #1 on Spotify in Jan 2026 tied to Stranger Things finale. New album 'The Crux' dropping April 4. 'End of Beginning' was a massive sleeper hit.
venue_sizes: Summer 2026 tour supporting Tame Impala + headlining dates at 2000-5000 cap venues (Allianz Amphitheater Richmond, Artpark).

name: Audrey Hobert
why_buzzing: Debut album 'Who's the Clown?' got widespread acclaim. Forbes 30 Under 30. Wrote songs for Gracie Abrams. Vevo DSCVR pick. First tour sold out in minutes at small venues.
venue_sizes: 500-1500 cap venues, scaling up. 'The Staircase to Stardom Tour' expanding to larger rooms.
source: Ones to Watch, Melodic Mag, Reddit popheads

name: Gigi Perez
why_buzzing: Vevo DSCVR Artist of the Year 2026. Hit 'Fable' viral across platforms. Bold storytelling and stage presence.

name: Alessi Rose
why_buzzing: Named on both Vevo DSCVR and Shazam Fast Forward 2026 lists. Strong Shazam discovery data trending upward.

name: KATSEYE
why_buzzing: EP gained huge traction, performed 'Gabriela' at Spotify BNA party. Strong Reddit buzz for full album in 2026.

name: Eli
why_buzzing: Internet's favorite niche popstar. Debut album 'Stage Girl' in 2025. Live debuts in LA and NY. Theatrical performances building cult following.

name: After
why_buzzing: Duo making nostalgic early-2000s trip-pop. Two EPs in 2025 gained major indie/music press attention. Unique Y2K visual aesthetic.
source: Ones to Watch, Consequence of Sound

name: EsDeeKid
why_buzzing: Liverpool rapper went viral multiple times in 2025. Debut project 'Rebel' had nearly every track go viral. Unique rage-drill-jerk fusion.
venue_sizes: UK focused, 500-2000 cap. US dates possible 2026.

name: Fakemink
why_buzzing: Drake brought him out at Wireless festival. Featured on EsDeeKid's viral 'LV Sandals'. Rapid ascent from UK underground.
venue_sizes: UK 1000-2000 cap. US festival appearances likely.

name: Absolutely
why_buzzing: South London singer, Raye's sister. Toured with Reneé Rapp, collab with Jonas Brothers. Ethereal vocal style gaining massive attention.

name: adore
why_buzzing: Breakout single 'did i tell u that i miss u' racked up hundreds of millions of streams. Y2K avatar aesthetic, internet phenomenon.
venue_sizes: Primarily digital act, live dates TBA.

name: AKRIILA
why_buzzing: Chilean rapper/singer pushing neoperreo movement globally. Debut 'epistolares' praised as groundbreaking. Experimental reggaeton meets club energy.
venue_sizes: 500-1500 cap Latin American circuit. US festival potential.
